review.notes: OCR is truncated mid-article (ends mid-sentence after "After winning the"), so some details in the long description — specifically the attribution of the quote about "narrow margin" to Gare — cannot be fully confirmed from the available text. However, the core facts (6-4 score, Vernon over Richmond, 2-0 series lead, best-of-seven BCJHL final, blown three-goal lead, Ernie Gare quote about second-period skating) all match the OCR. The byline "The Canadian Press" is confirmed by the OCR. No headline text is visible in the OCR, so the drafted headline is an AI inference, but it is factually accurate and appropriate.
